# Get All Creatives

**Web Service Endpoint**

Fetches all creatives within an organization.

## Discussion

Use this endpoint to fetch details of all assigned [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Creative] objects for your organization.

### Payload example: Get all creatives



## Creative Endpoints

- **Create a Creative**: Creates a creative object within an organization.
- **Find Creatives**: Finds creatives within an organization.
- **Get a Creative**: Fetches a creative by identifier.

items.description: Creates a creative object within an organization.
